name: Sweet and Sour Turkey
recipeIngredient: 16 oz package frozen broccoli, cauliflower, peas, and yellow peppers - thawed and drained
2 1.25 cups bottled sweet and sour sauce
1 can (8 oz) pineapple chunks in juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Crock-Pot, combine the thawed and drained vegetables, cubed cooked turkey, 1 bottle sweet and sour sauce, uncooked white rice, and water.
2. Cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or High for 3 to 4 hours.
3. In the last 30 minutes of cooking, stir in the canned fruit and a second bottle of sweet and sour sauce.
